{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44643", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 9.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-95", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Directives in Dynamically Evaluated Code ('Eval Injection')"}], "description": "## Impact

An attacker can write a malicious expression that escapes the sandbox to execute arbitrary code on the system.

Example of vulnerable code:

```
const expressions = require("angular-expressions");
const result = expressions.compile("a | __proto__")({}, {});
```

This should throw the error : Filter '__proto__' is not defined, however, this shows : 

Uncaught SyntaxError: Unexpected identifier 'Object'

With a more complex (undisclosed) payload, one can get full access to Arbitrary code execution on the system.

## Vulnerable versions : 

angular-expressions <= 1.5.1

## Patches

The problem has been patched in version 1.5.2 of angular-expressions.

## Credits

Credits go to San Gil from [www.securityoffice.io](https://securityoffice.io/) who has found the issue and reported it to us.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00476, "percentile": 0.37536}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-pw8r-6689-xvf4", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-11T16:20:58Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pw8r-6689-xvf4", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-pw8r-6689-xvf4"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44643"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-11T16:17:36Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T16:20:58Z", "references": ["https://github.com/peerigon/angular-expressions/security/advisories/GHSA-pw8r-6689-xvf4", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44643", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pw8r-6689-xvf4"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/peerigon/angular-expressions/security-advisories/GHSA-pw8r-6689-xvf4", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/peerigon/angular-expressions", "summary": "Angular Expressions - Remote Code Execution using filters", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T13:53:13Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-pw8r-6689-xvf4", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.5.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "angular-expressions"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.5.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Angular Expressions - Remote Code Execution using filters
